title: Section 40
content: 1[40. Election agents.--A candidate at an election may appoint in the prescribed manner any one person other than himself to be his election agent and when any such appointment is made, notice of the appointment shall be given in the prescribed manner to the returning officer.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 27 of 1956, s. 23, for section 40 (w.e.f. 28-8-1956).
